Since 1968

The Team.

Three generations. One family. No junior stylists.

Founder

Raffaello Marrello

Since 1968

Raffaello Marrello opened the salon in 1968 in Yorkville, Toronto. He built it on one principle: when you understand people, hairstyles become unlimited. He is still behind the chair.

Over five decades in the same neighbourhood. The same address. The same standard. The work does not need explaining.

“When you do styles you limit yourself to some people, when you do people hairstyles are unlimited.”
Creative Director

Christopher Marrello

Raffaello's son

Christopher Marrello is the Creative Director at Raffaello Salon. He has worked on international stages and editorial shoots. He brought those references back to Cumberland Street.

Every haircut in the salon reflects the standard Christopher holds. Precision. No shortcuts. The same discipline that has kept Raffaello in Yorkville for over 50 years.

Colour Director

Mellissa Marrello

Colour specialist

Mellissa Marrello is the Colour Director at Raffaello Salon. She specializes in corrective colour and precision balayage. Clients come to Mellissa when the colour has to be right the first time.

Her work includes balayage, ombré, highlights, lowlights, and colour correction. When the colour needs fixing, Mellissa is who Yorkville calls.

Book an appointment
with the team.
